attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
EX.ACTION_CD,                     
EX.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
EX.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
EX.BATCH_ID,                      
EX.CREATE_DATETIME,               
EX.CREATION_DATE,                 
EX.ENRICHMENT_CODE ,              
EX.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE  , 
EX.EXPIRATION_DATE,               
EX.GLOBAL_NAME,                   
EX.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID,                
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
EX.ORDER_LINE_ID ,                
EX.REASON_CODE,                   
EX.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG ,           
EX.SAV_ID,                        
EX.SAV_MEMBER_ID,   
EX.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,              
EX.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
EX.SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
EX.START_DATE,                    
EX.STATUS_CODE,                   
EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,              
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.VALIDATION_DATE,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL EX
WHERE EX.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL  STG
WHERE STG.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID=EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID)

SELECT
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY        AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT         AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
SPES.START_DATE                  AS START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE(SPES.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  END_TV_DTM,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NPS.PARTY_KEY                   AS 	SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    		 AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(SPES.ENRICHMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')             AS ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD,
COALESCE(SPES.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,'MANUAL')        AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE((SPES.SPLIT_PERCENT*100),0)         AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
COALESCE(SPES.REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                 AS NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
COALESCE(SPES.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,'=')       			 AS OWNED_FLG,	
COALESCE(SPES.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,'UNKNOWN')          AS HQ_REMOTE_CD,	
COALESCE(SPES.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,'UNKNOWN')    AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,
COALESCE(SPES.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')             AS VALIDATION_MODE_CD,
COALESCE(SPES.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')      AS VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(NES.ERP_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')                AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,
SPES.VALIDATION_DATE            AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
SPES.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID            AS SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  					EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  					EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SPES.UCRM_CASE_NUM AS UCRM_CASE_NUM, /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/
SPES.ACTION_CD				ACTION_CODE,
'I'					DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL SPES
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
ON SPES.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID=NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPS
ON SPES.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID=NPS.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND  NPS.SS_CODE='CR'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SPES.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
	AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NES
ON SPES.USER_NAME=NES.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
	ON SPES.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND SPES.GLOBAL_NAME = TRIM(NSOL.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_LINK_BIZ BIZV
ON SPES.SAV_MEMBER_ID = BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_NO_VLD_SA_GRP_PTY_RSN_BIZKEY NNVSGPRB 
ON SPES.REASON_CODE = NNVSGPRB.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,START_TV_DTM,ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT
STG.ACTION_CD,                     
STG.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
STG.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
STG.BATCH_ID ,                    
STG.CREATE_DATETIME,               
STG.CREATION_DATE ,                
STG.ENRICHMENT_CODE,               
STG.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,   
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,       
STG.EXPIRATION_DATE,               
STG.GLOBAL_NAME,                   
STG.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID ,               
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  ,            
STG.ORDER_LINE_ID,                 
STG.REASON_CODE ,                  
STG.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
STG.SAV_ID ,                       
STG.SAV_MEMBER_ID,   
STG.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,              
STG.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
STG.SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
STG.START_DATE ,                   
STG.STATUS_CODE,                   
STG.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID ,             
STG.USER_NAME,
STG.VALIDATION_DATE,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM   $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_SOL STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN   WK
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL   
ON STG.ORDER_LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
AND STG.GLOBAL_NAME = TRIM(NSOL.SS_CODE)
AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND WK.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT=STG.SAV_MEMBER_ID
AND STG.START_DATE=WK.START_TV_DTM)
